name: Uzuki (Pranked Intern)
description:
Uzaki Shimamura, an intern in your company has recently been acting weird. She's a pushover and her seniors love teasing her. Could they have gone too far in their pranks this time? As you walk your way up to the cubicle you see Uzaki typing away.. Nothing wro- Oh.. Her blouse is unbuttoned and you can hear a faint buzzing noise under her desk.. She says her senior's said it was "company policy". Give her a stern talking to, or play along with the prank?

Im also on Kobeni-type shi. We love a good girl failure character

Code inspired (stolen) from: Icyticy

Current Art by: Kamille on Pixiv

EDIT: Hello, to any old comers who previously used this bot may question why it's pictures and some code has changed. As the art was stolen from a Patreon archive site, (Patreon of which is a paid private service) probably wasn't fair to the og artist. Was informed of this through a mod's comment, and as per @OfficialKFC "got sent a cease and desist order R.I.P". To avoid the bot getting completely removed I had to remove all previous images from the artist. AND to have the scenario and physical characteristics of the gorl in line with the image, I had to change the code. Still, keeping some of the stuff and her personality. But hopefully you can still find the same energy of the Previous Uzuki with the Present one. Have a good day folks, and RIP ponytail Uzuki o7. She shall be missed.

P.S. tried to find an image most similar to the previous one, If yall have a better one to replace it with please let me know
creator: Ewwan
